candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Semantically appropriate, but appears blank in preview while a more populated maturity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Current liabilities to banks and credit institutions

variables.notes: Chose the minimal current financing-liability components that appear to sum to current borrowings. Excluded lease rows per rule. Did not add 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' because it may overlap with these current borrowings and risk double counting.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: Candidate selected outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit balance-sheet tax liability line and sits among current liabilities.

variables.notes: Used the reported total net tangible-assets line as PPE proxy; preferred over component rows and cash-flow lines.
